sections.title: Payment Terms
sections.content: Globex Inc must pay Acme Corp $10,000 within thirty days after receipt of invoice [Page 1 - PAYMENT TERMS].

sections.title: Governing Law
sections.content: The agreement is governed by New York law, with venue in New York County [Page 1 - GOVERNING LAW].
Globex Inc shall pay Acme Corp $10,000 within thirty days after receipt of invoice.
The agreement is governed by New York law and venue lies in New York County.

sections.title: Required Actions
sections.content: Northwind Traders must stop using the ACME mark and remove infringing materials within ten days [Page 1 - REQUIRED ACTIONS].
